user_story: As a System admin, I want to select a role and assign screens to it, so that users with that role can access only the intended screens
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Assign Roles screen; When I select a Role and check the required Screens and click Save; Then the screen permissions are saved for that role

user_story: As a System admin, I want to filter available screens by module, so that I can efficiently locate the screens to grant
acceptance_criteria: Given I am assigning roles; When I select a Module; Then the Screens list is scoped to that module's screens

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save and continue to the next role, so that I can configure permissions for multiple roles in one flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected screens for a role; When I click Save & Next; Then the assignment is saved and the screen readies the next role

user_story: As a System admin, I want to grant access across modules like Recruitment, Payroll-related Configuration and Leave Management, so that a role reflects the employee's real responsibilities
acceptance_criteria: Given a role is selected; When I choose screens from multiple modules and save; Then the role has access to all selected module screens
